summary: New Client Onboarding Flow Testing Complete. All backend APIs (13/13 tests) and frontend flows working correctly. POST /api/setup-wizard/new-account creates org, store, user with temp password. Frontend form renders without errors, search + manual entry both work, success screen shows credentials with copy button.

backend_new_account_endpoint.details: POST /api/setup-wizard/new-account creates org, store, user, and tracking record

backend_duplicate_email_409.details: Duplicate email returns HTTP 409 with 'already exists' message

backend_missing_fields_400.details: Missing business_name, contact_name, or contact_phone returns HTTP 400

backend_user_linking.details: User properly linked to org and store via organization_id, store_id, store_ids

backend_tracking_record.details: Tracking record created in onboarding_clients collection

frontend_business_search.details: Nominatim search returns results with auto-fill capability

frontend_manual_entry.details: Manual entry option visible after 3+ chars typed

frontend_details_form.details: Form shows Business Details, Industry pills, Contact Person, Plan selection

frontend_form_submission.details: Start Onboarding button submits to backend successfully

frontend_success_screen.details: Shows 'Account Created!' with credentials card (name, email, temp password, copy button)

admin_dashboard_button.details: Admin dashboard has 'Onboard New Account' hero button visible

more_menu_link.details: Administration section in more.tsx contains 'New Account Setup' link

critical_code_review_comments: Backend validates required fields (business_name, contact_name, contact_phone) at runtime with HTTPException 400
Email duplication check returns proper 409 Conflict status
Phone normalization handles both 10-digit and formatted inputs correctly
User created with needs_password_change=True for first login password reset
Tracking record in onboarding_clients preserves all step_data for audit
Frontend uses 3-step flow: search → details → success with proper state management
seed_data_creation: Test accounts created with TEST_ prefix during testing (auto-cleanup recommended)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New account onboarding fully functional. POST /api/setup-wizard/new-account endpoint creates complete org→store→user hierarchy. Frontend at /onboarding/new-account has search/manual entry flow with success screen showing temp credentials. Admin dashboard and more.tsx menu both link to this page.
